div.head:
No. 381.
Mr. de Zamacona to Mr. Evarts.

opener.dateline:
Legation of Mexico in the United States,
Washington, May 6, 1878. (Received May 6.)

div.p: Sir: I am informed by the note of your Department, dated the 4th instant, that the Chief Magistrate of this republic will vouchsafe to receive me to-morrow at noon, affording me occasion to present to him my credentials as envoy extraordinary and minister plenipotentiary of the Government of Mexico.

Availing myself of the benevolent invitation which the same note contains, I shall be in your Department shortly before the ceremony, in order to be conducted to the mansion of His Excellency the President.
